goal: Improve the internal panel docking UX in App.tsx by adding clearer live snap guidance while dragging the main layout resize handles.
constraints: Modify only src/renderer/src/App.tsx unless a tiny adjacent import/type adjustment is strictly required.
Build on the existing snapPanelLayout, handleMainPanelLayout, handleTopPanelLayout, isMainSnapActive, isTopSnapActive, and related drag state instead of replacing the architecture.
Do not weaken existing layout persistence, pop-out behavior, or panel layout locking.
Keep the current Omega dark visual language.
Prefer a compact, informative visual hint such as an overlay chip, target label, or live snap marker that makes the imminent docking result clearer.
success_criteria: While dragging the top or main resize handle, the UI communicates more clearly which snap target is active or near-active.
The added guidance remains scoped to the internal panel docking UX and does not disturb unrelated UI.
Existing snapping and persistence still work.
